user.title: Connect to FeederWatch AI
user.description: Enter the URL of your FeederWatch AI add-on. If running on this Home Assistant instance, the default is correct.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the FeederWatch AI add-on. Make sure it is running and the URL is correct.

abort.already_configured: This FeederWatch AI add-on is already configured.

data_description.notify_service: HA notify service to use for push notifications (e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_phone). Leave blank to disable.
data_description.notify_new_species_only: Only send push notifications when a new species is seen for the first time.
